reviews.review_description: Two previous reviews must be from developers because the graphics are like 16 bit. There's no instructions for anything and you just fall off the edge and Then the only way to get back is to 4. Stop the app, then restart it and start back over. There's nothing to do in this app. Just walk around at the 16 bit graphics

developer_response.body: Hello OG_PlayRoy, I have read your review and taken it as an opportunity to make this game better, the graphics are intentionaly low res to give it a nostalgic athstetic. We have updated the game to help users by adding the following: Teleport hitbox when falling, And a tutorial wall, Happy Flying

reviews.review_description: This game is so fun and I love all the planets and can’t WAUT for multiplayer and also I like the green space ship.I like doing barrel rolls and I looked in the bread future and this game will be 1 on the most popular section! THE CHARLES LECLERC OF THE APP STORE
This game is soo fun to play and go into the abyss of the unknown!!!!

reviews.review_title: Bro I found my new favorite game
reviews.review_description: This is the funnest game I’ve played in a long time I love this game I can’t wait to see the future updates thank you developers. There is something wrong with you if you don’t love this game
